hero-lede: It doesn't matter how you got here. There is a gentle next step for you. Are you brand new? Then start right at the beginning. Have you tried AI a little already? Then pick whatever you like the look of. You can't get this wrong.
However you got here, a gentle next step is waiting. New to all this? Start at the very beginning. Already had a little go? Jump to whatever you fancy. There are no wrong moves here.

However you arrived, a next step is waiting. New? Start at the beginning. Already dabbling? Jump to what you fancy. No wrong moves.
Next step waiting either way. New: start here. Dabbling: jump in. No wrong moves.
start-here-title: New to AI? You can start right here.

start-here-desc: This is a friendly intro that takes about five minutes. It tells you what AI is, how to give it a try, and three small things that will make you feel much more in control straight away.

card-foundations: The big picture, said in plain words. What AI is, what it isn't, and why it's worth a bit of your time. No hard words, and no rushing.

card-paths: Would you rather follow a set route? Follow a path that takes you from a curious beginner to someone who feels truly confident, one small step at a time.

card-explorables: Little models that you think with, not at. You drag the numbers and watch the idea reason back to you. It's the most fun way in.
